    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    A

    ADDRESS - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    Physical street address.
    analyse(String) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.SemanticPrivacyGuard
    Returns only the detected matches without applying redaction.
    API_KEY - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    API key, OAuth token, JWT, or similar bearer credential.
    API_KEY - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.RegexPatterns
    Common API key and secret token formats.

    B

    BANK_ACCOUNT - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    Bank account or routing number.
    BANK_ROUTING - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.RegexPatterns
    US ABA routing number — 9 digits following a keyword prefix.
    BLANK - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer.PIITokenizer.RedactionMode
    [REDACTED] — generic opaque placeholder.
    build() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig.Builder
    Builds and returns an immutable SPGConfig.
    buildDefaultClassifier() - Static method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.ml.TrainingData
    Returns a pre-fitted NaiveBayesClassifier trained on built-in data.
    builder() - Static method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
    Returns a builder pre-loaded with default values.
    buildReverseMap(boolean) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig.Builder
    Controls whether the reverse token-to-original map is populated.

    C

    Classpath placement - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp.NLPModelLoader
     
    com.semanticprivacyguard - package com.semanticprivacyguard
     
    com.semanticprivacyguard.config - package com.semanticprivacyguard.config
     
    com.semanticprivacyguard.detector - package com.semanticprivacyguard.detector
     
    com.semanticprivacyguard.ml - package com.semanticprivacyguard.ml
     
    com.semanticprivacyguard.model - package com.semanticprivacyguard.model
     
    com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp - package com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp
     
    com.semanticprivacyguard.stream - package com.semanticprivacyguard.stream
     
    com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer - package com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer
     
    com.semanticprivacyguard.util - package com.semanticprivacyguard.util
     
    Common causes and fixes - Section in exception class com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp.NLPModelException
     
    compareTo(PIIMatch) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch
    Orders matches by their start position, then by end position descending (longest match first for the same start).
    CompositeDetector - Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.detector
    Combines the outputs of multiple PIIDetector implementations and returns a de-duplicated, non-overlapping list of matches.
    CompositeDetector(List) - Constructor for class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.CompositeDetector
    Creates a composite detector that runs each supplied detector in order.
    Confidence threshold - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.MLDetector
     
    containsPII() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.RedactionResult
    Returns true if at least one PII item was detected.
    containsPII(String) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.SemanticPrivacyGuard
    Convenience method: scans text and returns true if any PII above the configured minimum severity is detected.
    contextWindow(String, List, int, int) - Static method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.TextUtils
    Returns up to windowSize words on each side of the word at tokenIndex in the list of token spans, as a single concatenated lowercase string (useful as a feature vector for the ML layer).
    COORDINATES - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    GPS / geolocation coordinates.
    COORDINATES - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.RegexPatterns
    Latitude/longitude coordinate pairs in decimal-degree notation.
    countUppercase(String) - Static method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.TextUtils
    Counts the number of uppercase letters in s.
    create() - Static method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.SemanticPrivacyGuard
    Creates a new instance with default configuration.
    create(SPGConfig) - Static method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.SemanticPrivacyGuard
    Creates a new instance with the supplied configuration.
    CREDIT_CARD - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    Payment card number validated by the Luhn algorithm.
    CREDIT_CARD - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.RegexPatterns
    Payment card number — covers 13–19 digit cards with optional spaces or hyphens between groups of 4 digits.
    Custom configuration - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.SemanticPrivacyGuard
     

    D

    DATE_OF_BIRTH - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    Date of birth.
    DATE_OF_BIRTH - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.RegexPatterns
    Date-of-birth patterns — triggered only when adjacent to contextual keywords (dob, born, date of birth, born on).
    De-duplication strategy - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.CompositeDetector
     
    DEFAULT_BUILD_REVERSE_MAP - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     
    DEFAULT_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.MLDetector
    Default minimum posterior probability to flag a token as PII.
    DEFAULT_HEURISTIC_ENABLED - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     
    DEFAULT_MIN_SEVERITY - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     
    DEFAULT_ML_ENABLED - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     
    DEFAULT_ML_THRESHOLD - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     
    DEFAULT_NLP_ENABLED - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     
    DEFAULT_NLP_THRESHOLD - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     
    DEFAULT_REDACTION_MODE - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     
    defaults() - Static method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
    Returns a default configuration instance.
    Design Decisions - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.RegexPatterns
     
    detect(String) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.CompositeDetector
     
    detect(String) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.HeuristicDetector
     
    detect(String) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.MLDetector
     
    detect(String) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.NLPDetector
    Runs OpenNLP NER on text and returns all person-name and organisation-name spans that meet the configured probability threshold.
    detect(String) - Method in interface com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.PIIDetector
    Scans the supplied text and returns every PII span detected.
    Detected types - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.NLPDetector
     
    De-tokenisation - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer.PIITokenizer
     
    digitsOnly(String) - Static method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.TextUtils
    Strips all non-digit characters from s and returns the result.

    E

    EMAIL - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    Personal or corporate email address.
    EMAIL - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.RegexPatterns
    RFC 5321-inspired email pattern.
    enabledTypes(Set) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig.Builder
    Restricts detection to the specified PII types.
    equals(Object) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch
     
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp.NLPModelLoader.LoadedModels
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer.PIITokenizer.RedactionOutput
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    extract(String, List, int) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.ml.FeatureExtractor
    Extracts features for the token at tokenIndex in spans.

    F

    Feature categories - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.ml.FeatureExtractor
     
    FeatureExtractor - Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.ml
    Extracts a bag-of-words feature vector for a candidate token and its surrounding context window.
    FeatureExtractor() - Constructor for class com.semanticprivacyguard.ml.FeatureExtractor
    Creates an extractor with the default 3-word context window.
    FeatureExtractor(int) - Constructor for class com.semanticprivacyguard.ml.FeatureExtractor
    Creates an extractor with a custom context window.
    Filesystem placement - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp.NLPModelLoader
     
    finalizeFit() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.ml.NaiveBayesClassifier
    Finalises training: computes log-priors and log-likelihoods with Laplace smoothing.
    fromClasspath() - Static method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp.NLPModelLoader
    Loads models from the classpath under the models/ resource prefix.
    fromDirectory(Path) - Static method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp.NLPModelLoader
    Loads models from the specified filesystem directory.

    G

    GENERIC_PII - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    Catch-all for generic sensitive tokens that do not fit a specific type but were flagged by the ML classifier with sufficient confidence.
    getClasses() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.ml.NaiveBayesClassifier
    Returns the ordered list of class labels that correspond to the probability array returned by NaiveBayesClassifier.predictProba(List).
    getConfidence() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch
     
    getConfig() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.SemanticPrivacyGuard
    Returns the active configuration for this instance.
    getEnabledTypes() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
    Returns the set of enabled types; empty set means all types are enabled.
    getEndIndex() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch
     
    getLabel() - Method in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    Returns the short label used inside replacement tokens.
    getLinesWithPII() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.stream.StreamRedactionSummary
    Returns the number of lines on which at least one PII match was found.
    getMatchCount() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.RedactionResult
    Returns the number of PII items detected.
    getMatchCountByType() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.stream.StreamRedactionSummary
    Returns an unmodifiable map from PIIType to the number of times that type was detected across all lines.
    getMatches() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.RedactionResult
    Returns an unmodifiable list of all PII matches, sorted by position.
    getMinimumSeverity() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     
    getMlConfidenceThreshold() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     
    getNlpConfidenceThreshold() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     
    getNlpModelsDirectory() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
    Returns the directory from which OpenNLP model files are loaded, or null if models should be loaded from the classpath.
    getOriginalText() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.RedactionResult
    Returns the original, unmodified input text.
    getPIILineRatio() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.stream.StreamRedactionSummary
    Returns the fraction of lines that contained PII, in the range [0.0, 1.0].
    getProcessingTimeMs() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.RedactionResult
    Returns the wall-clock processing time in milliseconds.
    getProcessingTimeMs() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.stream.StreamRedactionSummary
    Returns the wall-clock processing time for the full pass in milliseconds.
    getRedactedText() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.RedactionResult
    Returns the sanitised text with PII replaced by tokens.
    getRedactionMode() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     
    getReverseMap() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.RedactionResult
    Returns an unmodifiable reverse-lookup map.
    getSeverity() - Method in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    Returns the severity score (1–10).
    getSource() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch
     
    getStartIndex() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch
     
    getTotalLines() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.stream.StreamRedactionSummary
    Returns the total number of lines read from the source.
    getTotalMatches() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.stream.StreamRedactionSummary
    Returns the total number of individual PII matches across all lines.
    getType() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch
     
    getValue() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch
     
    GOVERNMENT_ID - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    Passport, driver's licence, or national ID number.

    H

    hashCode() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch
     
    hashCode() - Method in record class com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp.NLPModelLoader.LoadedModels
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer.PIITokenizer.RedactionOutput
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hasPII() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.stream.StreamRedactionSummary
    Returns true if at least one PII match was found anywhere in the stream.
    HEURISTIC - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch.DetectionSource
    Pattern matched a hard-coded regular expression.
    HeuristicDetector - Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.detector
    Layer 1 detector — pattern-based heuristics using the compiled regexes in RegexPatterns.
    HeuristicDetector() - Constructor for class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.HeuristicDetector
    Creates a detector that checks all PII types.
    HeuristicDetector(Set) - Constructor for class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.HeuristicDetector
    Creates a detector that checks only the specified types.
    heuristicEnabled(boolean) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig.Builder
    Enables or disables the heuristic (regex) detection layer.
    How it disambiguates - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.MLDetector
     
    HYBRID - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch.DetectionSource
    Matched by two or more detection layers independently.

    I

    IBAN - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.RegexPatterns
    IBAN (International Bank Account Number) — 2-letter country code followed by 2 check digits and up to 30 alphanumeric chars.
    IP_ADDRESS - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    IPv4 or IPv6 address.
    IPV4 - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.RegexPatterns
    IPv4 address with octet range validation.
    IPV6 - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.RegexPatterns
    Full and compressed IPv6 addresses (including :: notation and mixed IPv4-in-IPv6 forms).
    isAlphanumeric(String) - Static method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.TextUtils
    Returns true if s consists entirely of characters in the set [a-zA-Z0-9].
    isBuildReverseMap() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     
    isClean() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.RedactionResult
    Returns true if the text was unchanged (no PII detected).
    isFitted() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.ml.NaiveBayesClassifier
    Returns whether the classifier has been fitted.
    isHeuristicEnabled() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     
    isMlEnabled() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     
    isNlpEnabled() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig
     

    L

    length() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch
    Returns the length of the matched span.
    LoadedModels(TokenNameFinderModel, TokenNameFinderModel, TokenizerModel) - Constructor for record class com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp.NLPModelLoader.LoadedModels
    Creates an instance of a LoadedModels record class.
    luhnCheck(String) - Static method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.TextUtils
    Validates a payment card number using the Luhn (mod-10) algorithm.

    M

    MASK - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer.PIITokenizer.RedactionMode
    ████████ — fixed-width mask, length matches original.
    Mathematical Foundation - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.ml.NaiveBayesClassifier
     
    MEDICAL_RECORD - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    Medical record number, diagnosis code, or HIPAA-protected identifier.
    minimumSeverity(int) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig.Builder
    Sets the minimum severity score (1–10) a match must have to be included in results.
    ML - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch.DetectionSource
    Classified as PII by the Naive Bayes context model.
    mlConfidenceThreshold(double) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig.Builder
    Sets the Naive Bayes posterior probability threshold for the ML layer.
    MLDetector - Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.detector
    Layer 2 detector — context-aware classification using a Naive Bayes model.
    MLDetector() - Constructor for class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.MLDetector
    Creates a detector using the built-in training corpus and default threshold.
    MLDetector(NaiveBayesClassifier, FeatureExtractor, double) - Constructor for class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.MLDetector
    Creates a detector with a custom classifier and threshold.
    mlEnabled(boolean) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig.Builder
    Enables or disables the ML (Naive Bayes) detection layer.
    Model files - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp.NLPModelLoader
     

    N

    NaiveBayesClassifier - Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.ml
    Multinomial Naive Bayes classifier — pure Java, zero external dependencies.
    NaiveBayesClassifier() - Constructor for class com.semanticprivacyguard.ml.NaiveBayesClassifier
     
    name() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.CompositeDetector
     
    name() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.HeuristicDetector
     
    name() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.MLDetector
     
    name() - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.NLPDetector
     
    name() - Method in interface com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.PIIDetector
    Returns a short human-readable name used in logging and metrics (e.g.
    NLP - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch.DetectionSource
    Identified by the Apache OpenNLP Named Entity Recogniser.
    nlpConfidenceThreshold(double) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig.Builder
    Sets the minimum OpenNLP NameFinderME probability for a named entity to be accepted as a PII match.
    NLPDetector - Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.detector
    PII detector backed by Apache OpenNLP Named Entity Recognition.
    NLPDetector(NLPModelLoader.LoadedModels, double) - Constructor for class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.NLPDetector
    Creates an NLPDetector from pre-loaded OpenNLP models.
    nlpEnabled(boolean) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig.Builder
    Enables the Apache OpenNLP Named Entity Recognition layer, which significantly improves detection of person names and organisation names in natural language text.
    NLPModelException - Exception Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp
    Thrown when Apache OpenNLP model files cannot be found or loaded.
    NLPModelException(String) - Constructor for exception class com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp.NLPModelException
    Constructs a new NLPModelException with the given detail message.
    NLPModelException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp.NLPModelException
    Constructs a new NLPModelException with a detail message and cause.
    NLPModelLoader - Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp
    Loads Apache OpenNLP model files for use by NLPDetector.
    NLPModelLoader.LoadedModels - Record Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp
    Holds the OpenNLP model objects loaded from disk or classpath.
    nlpModelsDirectory(Path) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig.Builder
    Specifies the directory from which OpenNLP model files are loaded.

    O

    Obtaining the models - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp.NLPModelLoader
     
    ORGANIZATION - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    Organisation or company name detected via ML.
    organizationModel() - Method in record class com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp.NLPModelLoader.LoadedModels
    Returns the value of the organizationModel record component.
    overlaps(PIIMatch) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch
    Returns true if this match overlaps with other.

    P

    PASSWORD - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    Password or passphrase literal appearing in plaintext.
    PASSWORD - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.RegexPatterns
    Password literal patterns — matches common patterns like password: MyS3cr3t!, pwd = "hunter2", etc.
    PERSON_NAME - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    Full name detected via ML context classifier.
    personModel() - Method in record class com.semanticprivacyguard.nlp.NLPModelLoader.LoadedModels
    Returns the value of the personModel record component.
    PHONE - Enum constant in enum class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
    Phone number in any common format.
    PHONE - Static variable in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.RegexPatterns
    North American and international phone numbers.
    PIIDetector - Interface in com.semanticprivacyguard.detector
    Contract for all PII detection strategies.
    PIIMatch - Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.model
    Represents a single detected occurrence of PII within the original text.
    PIIMatch(PIIType, String, int, int, PIIMatch.DetectionSource, double) - Constructor for class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIMatch
    Constructs a new PIIMatch.
    PIIMatch.DetectionSource - Enum Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.model
    How a particular match was discovered.
    PIITokenizer - Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer
    Replaces detected PII spans in text with structured replacement tokens.
    PIITokenizer() - Constructor for class com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer.PIITokenizer
    Creates a tokenizer using PIITokenizer.RedactionMode.TOKEN (default).
    PIITokenizer(PIITokenizer.RedactionMode) - Constructor for class com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer.PIITokenizer
    Creates a tokenizer using the specified redaction mode.
    PIITokenizer.RedactionMode - Enum Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer
    Determines how detected PII is represented in the output.
    PIITokenizer.RedactionOutput - Record Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer
    Holds the redacted text string and the token → original reverse map.
    PIIType - Enum Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.model
    Enumeration of all PII (Personally Identifiable Information) types that Semantic Privacy Guard can detect and redact.
    Post-match validation - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.HeuristicDetector
     
    predict(List) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.ml.NaiveBayesClassifier
    Returns the most likely class label for the given features.
    predictProba(List) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.ml.NaiveBayesClassifier
    Returns a probability distribution over all classes for the given features.

    Q

    Quick start - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.SemanticPrivacyGuard
     
    Quick start - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.stream.StreamProcessor
     

    R

    redact(InputStream, OutputStream) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.stream.StreamProcessor
    Byte-stream variant using UTF-8 encoding.
    redact(InputStream, OutputStream, Charset) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.stream.StreamProcessor
    Byte-stream variant of StreamProcessor.redact(Reader, Writer).
    redact(Reader, Writer) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.stream.StreamProcessor
    Reads lines from reader, redacts PII in each line, and writes the sanitised lines to writer.
    redact(String) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.SemanticPrivacyGuard
    Scans text for PII and returns a full RedactionResult containing the sanitised text, all detected matches, and (optionally) a reverse-lookup map.
    redact(String, List) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer.PIITokenizer
    Applies all matches to text, returning the redacted string and a reverse-lookup map.
    redact(String, List, Map) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer.PIITokenizer
    Applies all matches to text using the supplied sharedCounters map for token numbering.
    redact(Path, Path) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.stream.StreamProcessor
    File-to-file redaction.
    redactedText() - Method in record class com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer.PIITokenizer.RedactionOutput
    Returns the value of the redactedText record component.
    redactionMode(PIITokenizer.RedactionMode) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.config.SPGConfig.Builder
    Sets the output redaction mode.
    Redaction modes - Section in class com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer.PIITokenizer
     
    RedactionOutput(String, Map) - Constructor for record class com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer.PIITokenizer.RedactionOutput
    Creates an instance of a RedactionOutput record class.
    RedactionResult - Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.model
    Immutable result object returned by SemanticPrivacyGuard.redact().
    RedactionResult(String, String, List, Map, long) - Constructor for class com.semanticprivacyguard.model.RedactionResult
    Constructs a RedactionResult.
    redactLines(Stream) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.stream.StreamProcessor
    Returns a lazy Stream<String> where each element is the redacted version of the corresponding input line.
    redactPath(Path, Path) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.SemanticPrivacyGuard
    Convenience method: redacts a file on disk and writes the result to another file, processing line-by-line with constant heap usage.
    redactStream(InputStream, OutputStream) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.SemanticPrivacyGuard
    Convenience method: redacts an InputStream line-by-line and writes the sanitised output to out, both streams treated as UTF-8.
    redactStream(Reader, Writer) - Method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.SemanticPrivacyGuard
    Convenience method: redacts a character stream line-by-line.
    RegexPatterns - Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.util
    Centralised registry of all compiled regular expressions used by HeuristicDetector.
    reverseMap() - Method in record class com.semanticprivacyguard.tokenizer.PIITokenizer.RedactionOutput
    Returns the value of the reverseMap record component.

    S

    SemanticPrivacyGuard - Class in com.semanticprivacyguard
    Semantic Privacy Guard — primary public API.
    shannonEntropy(String) - Static method in class com.semanticprivacyguard.util.TextUtils
    Returns the Shannon entropy (bits per character) of s.
    SPGConfig - Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.config

    StreamProcessor - Class in com.semanticprivacyguard.stream
    Memory-efficient, line-by-line PII redaction over streams and files.

    Creates a StreamProcessor from the given configuration.
